json.name: Dimension
json.description: A tag applied to dimension columns. Dimensions are categorical attributes used to slice/group facts.

json.name: Measure
json.description: A tag applied to measure (metric) columns. Measures are numeric values that are aggregated.

json.name: SAP Currency
json.description: Column holds a currency amount per SAP CDS `@Common.IsCurrency`.

json.name: SAP Unit
json.description: Column holds a unit-of-measure code per SAP CDS `@Common.IsUnit`.

json.name: SAP Calendar: Year
json.description: Column holds a calendar year (YYYY) per SAP CDS `@Common.IsCalendarYear`.

json.name: SAP Calendar: Month
json.description: Column holds a calendar month per SAP CDS `@Common.IsCalendarMonth`.

json.name: SAP Calendar: Quarter
json.description: Column holds a calendar quarter per SAP CDS `@Common.IsCalendarQuarter`.

json.name: SAP Calendar: Week
json.description: Column holds a calendar week per SAP CDS `@Common.IsCalendarWeek`.

json.name: SAP Calendar: Date
json.description: Column holds a calendar date per SAP CDS `@Common.IsCalendarDate`.

json.name: SAP Calendar: Year-Month
json.description: Column holds a calendar year-month per SAP CDS `@Common.IsCalendarYearMonth`.

json.name: SAP.TIME.M_TIME_DIMENSION
json.description: Local Table from SAP Datasphere space DEMO_SPACE.

json.name: SAP.TIME.M_TIME_DIMENSION_TDAY
json.description: Local Table from SAP Datasphere space DEMO_SPACE.

json.name: SAP.TIME.M_TIME_DIMENSION_TMONTH
json.description: Local Table from SAP Datasphere space DEMO_SPACE.

json.name: SAP.TIME.M_TIME_DIMENSION_TQUARTER
json.description: Local Table from SAP Datasphere space DEMO_SPACE.
